notes: v344 — ORDERS PLACED BEFORE THE MARKET OPENS NOW COUNT FOR TODAY. If you queue a buy before the ASX opens (before 10:00am Sydney) — say at 6am — it's now treated as working from the opening bell. So if the share touches your price point during today's session, it fills TODAY and shows in tonight's results. Before this, an early-morning order couldn't fill until the next trading day, even though you'd placed it hours before the open — that's fixed. Orders you place DURING the trading day or AFTER the close still start from the next session (nothing fills on a day that was already finished when you clicked buy). This applies to your 🎯 pick orders, manual limit buys, queued market buys, and the auto-pilot's own entries. Note: it fills only if the price is actually hit that day, and only for orders placed before the open. Hard-refresh to load v344. ALSO RECENT — v343 — Top 20 is a single-column ladder (ranked 1–20, one share per line, hover for the full breakdown). v342 — fixed the table's colour seam. v341 — checked the maths and upgraded RSI to Wilder's standard. v340 — the 📊 Range column is back. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
